calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-26-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Margaret Del Coto
Appearances:
Karin S. Schwartz, Esq. for Plaintiff Kathryn P. Jett, in her official capacity as Director of the California Dept. of Alcohol and Drug Programs, a state agency.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants The Metropolitan Fresh Start House aka Metropolitan Fresh Start Program and Kinwood H. Devore, Excutive Director.
Defendants, employees of Defendants, and all parties in concert with them are here by permanently enjoined from providing drug and alcohol treatment and recovery services without a license from the State of California. Defendants shall pay to Plaintiff the amount of $265.00 recoverable costs.

Judgment signed in open court.

Plaintiff Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction (Per Ex Parte Order Of 06/19/03)
Off Calendar Jul-24-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION:
APPEAR: Karin S. Schwartz, Deputy Atty General 703-1382 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT-NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open court. (302/REQ/ju) Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
